mechanics.raw_text:
PARANOIA seca 
General Vehicle Types Crawler: These are tracked allterrain vehicles Used for missions in the Outdoors. They come in various sizes and designs. Some are Specifically intended to cary personnel; some are for transporting aw materials from the Out- doors: some are armored and designed for military applications. They are relatively slow but can travel in extremely rough terrain and ‘are reliable water craft in the calm waters of Takes and large rivers, ‘Autocar: This is the most common type of \ehicle inside Alpha Complex, corresponding to modem personal cars, small trucks, and vans, They are “auto” cars in the sense that they may be slaved to automatic guidance systems that run beneath the surface ofall the roadways in Alpha Complex, but they may also be operated manually for unusual maneuvers ‘or where the guidance systems are no longer maintained, They come in all shapes and sizes and are in relatively good supply. Hover: This is a specialized variety of air cushion vehicle that was very popular in Old Reckoning times. tis still used in the Outdoors When missions permit using the ancient road- ways. Hovers can also cross lakes and large rivers. They are capable of high speeds on food road surfaces and across calm water, but they are not safe in dificult terrain or rough water, They make poor combat vehicles, since they bear litle armor or armament. Hovers ‘come in various sizes, but the fourtorsix man version is most commonly used for Trouble: shooter missions Copter: These are very similar to moder helicopters. Small, two-man models are relatively common. In addition to.
